name: Lift Shadow
description: Card lifts with growing shadow on hover.

name: Glow Ring
description: Radiant glow ring expands from element edge.

name: Shimmer Sweep
description: Bright shimmer sweeps across element on hover.

name: Color Fill
description: Background fills from bottom to top on hover.

name: Scale Up
Underline Slide
description: Underline grows from center outward on hover.

name: Neon Border
description: Pulsing neon border appears on hover.

name: Rotate Icon
description: Element rotates 45° on hover — great for + / × icons.

name: Border Draw
description: Border draws in from top-left corner on hover.

name: Card Flip
description: Card flips to reveal back face — CSS 3D perspective.

name: Blur & Reveal
description: Content blurs and a hidden label fades in on hover.

name: Ripple Click
description: Ripple emanates from click point on interaction.

name: 3D Tilt
description: Element tilts in perspective on mouse move (needs JS).

name: Spotlight
description: Radial light spotlight follows the cursor in the card.

name: Magnetic Pull
description: Element is pulled toward the cursor (needs JS mousemove).
